chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI SCRA 900, 901 & 902 of 2023 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on office objection 2. For hearing of main case 3. For hearing of CMA No.1130/2023 06.05.2026 Mr. Khalid Mehmood Rajpar, advocate for the applicant Ms. Saima Syed advocate files vakalatnamas on behalf of respondent in these matters which are taken on record. Pursuant to order dated 22.04.2026, learned counsel for respondent states that it may be just and proper to set aside the impugned order and remand back the matters to the learned Tribunal for adjudication afresh in accordance with law expeditiously, preferably within 90 days. Learned counsel further seeks that pending the aforesaid no coercive action be taken against the respondent arising here from. Learned counsel for the applicant articulates no cavil in such regard and states that the reference applications may be disposed off in the said terms. Order accordingly. A copy of this decision may also be sent under the seal of this Court and signature of the Registrar to the learned Customs Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 196 of the Customs Act, 1969. Office is instructed to place copy of this order in connected matters. Judge Judge Amjad
